[Photo] 🤝  **Unity Network - Unity Token (UNT) Whitepaper Is Live**

Introducing Unity Token (UNT)

The next evolution of the Unity Network platform is here.

• Community-owned with zero team allocation
• 90% distributed to the community, 10% to a community governance-controlled treasury
• Governance powered by staking UNT on Unity Nodes
• Developers use UNT to deploy and run applications
• 50% of developer fees distributed to node operators
• Deflationary design driven by real network usage

The Unity Token Whitepaper is now live.

Dive into the full details and see how UNT powers utility, governance, and rewards across the network:
